headline: Is It Time To Revisit Kimberly-Clark (KMB) After A 24% One-Year Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Kimberly-Clark is offering good value at its recent price, you are not alone, especially given its reputation as a well known consumer staples name. The stock recently closed at US$104.58, with returns of 1.3% over the past month, a 3.1% gain year to date, but with a 24.6% decline over the last year and softer 3 and 5 year returns of 4.0% and 5.6% declines respectively. These mixed returns have kept interest alive in Kimberly-Clark as investors weigh its...
